case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. MAKELA CLAY et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR UD JUDGMNT & FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMNT PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLAY, MAKELA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1449 D CROAKER COURT, SAN FRANCISCO; ATTENDANT GARAGE, STORAGE AND COMMON AREAS $2,277.90 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,277.90, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF FAIR RENTAL VALUE $50.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY, MAKELA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY, MAKELA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY, MAKELA DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY, MAKELA
ORDER ON EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT
